0.content:
# Dynatrace MCP Server — Usage Overview
Activity driven through the Dynatrace MCP Server, derived from Grail query-execution events (`dt.system.events`, `event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT"`) whose `client.client_context` identifies the `dynatrace-mcp-server`. Shows query volume, data scanned (Grail cost driver), active users, targeted data types, and the most expensive queries. Use the time-frame picker to change the reporting window.

1.title: Total MCP Queries
1.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| summarize `Total MCP Queries` = countDistinct(query_id)

2.title: Data Scanned (GB)
2.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| summarize bytes = sum(scanned_bytes)
| fieldsAdd `Data Scanned (GB)` = bytes / 1000000000.0
| fields `Data Scanned (GB)`

3.title: Records Scanned
3.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| summarize `Records Scanned` = sum(scanned_records)

4.title: Active Users
4.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| summarize `Active Users` = countDistinct(user.email)

5.title: MCP Queries Over Time
5.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| summarize scanned_bytes = sum(scanned_bytes), by:{query_id, timestamp}
| makeTimeSeries queries = count()

6.title: Data Scanned Over Time (bytes)
6.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| makeTimeSeries `scanned bytes` = sum(scanned_bytes)

7.title: Data Scanned by Data Type (GB)
7.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| filter isNotNull(table) and table != ""
| summarize bytes = sum(scanned_bytes), by:{table}
| fieldsAdd `Scanned GB` = bytes / 1000000000.0
| fields table, `Scanned GB`
| sort `Scanned GB` desc

8.title: Queries by Data Type
8.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| filter isNotNull(table) and table != ""
| summarize Queries = countDistinct(query_id), by:{table}
| sort Queries desc

9.title: MCP Client Version
9.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| summarize Queries = countDistinct(query_id), by:{client.client_context}
| sort Queries desc

10.title: Usage by User
10.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| summarize Queries = countDistinct(query_id), bytes = sum(scanned_bytes), Records = sum(scanned_records), by:{user.email}
| fieldsAdd `Scanned GB` = bytes / 1000000000.0
| fields user.email, Queries, `Scanned GB`, Records
| sort `Scanned GB` desc
| limit 50

11.title: Top Queries by Data Scanned
11.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| filter isNotNull(query_string)
| summarize bytes = sum(scanned_bytes), Records = sum(scanned_records), table = takeFirst(table), by:{query_id, query_string}
| fieldsAdd `Scanned GB` = bytes / 1000000000.0
| fields query_string, table, `Scanned GB`, Records
| sort `Scanned GB` desc
| limit 25
